docket_entries.description: OVERPAYMENT OF $10.00, TRAN # W1012531O008, TAG # 030728 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ SR, JOE HERNANDEZ, RITA

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ZEN COMPOUND LLC, DBA TEMPLE NIGHT CLUB, AND PAUL HEMMING'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEPTEMBER 13, 2012 TO GIVE THE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 6, 2012 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ZEN COMPOUND LLC DBA TEMPLE NIGHT CLUB AND PAUL HEMMING'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO ALLEGE SUFFICIENT ULTIMATE FACTS FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ZEN COMPOUND LLC AND DEFENDANT PAUL HEMMING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The Order to Show Cause is ordered off calendar. Dismissal on file. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Zen Compound Llc Dba Temple Night Club And Paul Hemming'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Zen Compound LLC dba Temple Night Club And Paul Hemming's Motion To Strike Punitive Damages From Complaint is granted. The Complaint fails to allege sufficient ultimate facts for punitive damages. The motion to strike punitive damages is granted only as to Defendant Zen Compound LLC and Defendant Paul Hemming. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs ZEN COMPOUND LLC, DBA TEMPLE NIGHT CLUB, and PAUL HEMMING's MOTION TO STRIKE punitive damages from COMPLAINT is Continued on the court's own motion to September 13, 2012 to give the plaintiff an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The plaintiff must provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers to department 302 no later than September 6, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
